accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; the rule citation and operative effect are correct.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as disapproving the EPA heavy-duty vehicle standards rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: States the rule would have no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in the bill.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date stated; omission appropriate.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the targeted rule, its Fed. Reg. citation, and the operative nullification language.
